nasb.text: Rejoice, O nations, with His people; For He will avenge the blood of His servants, And will render vengeance on His adversaries, And will atone for His land and His people.”

esv.text: “Rejoice with him, O heavens; bow down to him, all gods, for he avenges the blood of his children and takes vengeance on his adversaries. He repays those who hate him and cleanses his people’s land.”

cnv.text: 列國啊，你們當與耶和華的子民一同歡呼， 因為他要伸他僕人流血的冤，他要向他的仇人報復， 他要救贖他的地和他的子民。”

ccb.text: “列邦啊， 你们当与祂的子民一同欢乐！ 因为祂要为自己的仆人报血仇， 报应祂的仇敌， 洁净祂的土地和子民。”
